statement: A short-horizon long strategy that enters when abnormal flow proxy (volume spike) aligns with RSI pullback and short-trend support can deliver positive risk-adjusted returns over intraday-to-3-day holds.
rationale: Behavioral/flow rationale: abnormal participation often precedes short-term repricing; technical filters reduce false positives by requiring pullback state plus trend support.
entry_trigger: BUY when volume >= 1.5x 15-bar average AND RSI(14) <= 35 AND price >= 0.995 * SMA(15).
exit_trigger: SELL when RSI(14) >= 55 OR price < 0.99 * SMA(15), plus hard risk controls stop=-2% / take=+3%.
